name: Hershey's 50% Reduced Fat Banana Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces HERSHEY'S Baking Chips (Reduced Fat Semi-Sweet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly spray two 9x5x3-inch loaf pans with non-stick vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a small bowl, stir together sour cream and baking soda; set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat sugar and margarine on medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
5. Add egg substitute and salt; beat well.
6. Gradually add flour to the sugar mixture, beating until well combined.
7. Add sour cream mixture, mashed banana, and vanilla; beat until smooth.
8. Fold in chips and nuts.
9. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
10. Bake 45 to 55 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Cool for 10 minutes.
12. Remove from pans and immediately wrap in plastic wrap.
13. Allow to cool completely before slicing.
Nutrition facts:
Serving size: 1 slice (53g)
Servings: 32
Amount Per Serving: Calories 160, Fat 35 calories, Total Fat 5g, Saturated Fat 2.5g, Cholesterol 0mg, Sodium 150mg, Total Carbohydrates 27g, Dietary Fiber 1g, Sugars 17g, Protein 3g, Vitamin A 0%, Vitamin C 0%, Calcium 0%, Iron 4%
Percent Daily Values are based on a 2,000 calorie diet. contains 2g of Salatrim per serving, only 55% of which is used by the body. Therefore this recipe provides 4g of available fat per serving vs 11g in the regular Hershey's Chocolate Chip Banana Nut Bread recipe.
